title: At the Train Station
description: Learn how to buy train tickets and navigate a Dutch train station.

content.text: Welcome! Dutch trains ('de trein') are famous for being efficient and connecting the whole country. In this lesson, you'll learn how to navigate the station like a local.

data.phrase: Ik wil graag een kaartje naar...
data.meaning: I would like a ticket to...

content.title: Buying a Ticket
content.setting: You're at Amsterdam Central Station and need to buy a ticket to Utrecht.

conversation_flow.title: Greet and state destination
conversation_flow.chatbot_message: Goedemiddag. Wat kan ik voor u doen?

conversation_flow.title: Choose single or return
conversation_flow.chatbot_message: Naar Utrecht. Wilt u een enkeltje of een retourtje?

conversation_flow.title: Hear the price
conversation_flow.chatbot_message: Een enkeltje naar Utrecht. Dat is dan 9 euro 50, alstublieft.

data.meaning: What time does the train leave?

data.phrase: Van welk spoor vertrekt de trein?
data.meaning: From which track does the train leave?

content.title: Finding Your Platform
content.setting: You have your ticket but need to find the right platform. Ask a station employee.

conversation_flow.title: Ask about the track
conversation_flow.chatbot_message: De trein naar Utrecht vertrekt om 14:15.

conversation_flow.title: Confirm you understand
conversation_flow.chatbot_message: Spoor 5. Aan de linkerkant van het station. U heeft nog tien minuten!

data.meaning: Does the train have a delay?

content.title: Dealing with a Delay
content.setting: Your train is delayed. Ask for information about what to do.

conversation_flow.title: Ask about the delay
conversation_flow.chatbot_message: Heeft u een vraag over de trein?

conversation_flow.title: Ask about transfers
conversation_flow.chatbot_message: Ja, de trein naar Utrecht heeft tien minuten vertraging. Het spijt me.

conversation_flow.title: Thank the employee
conversation_flow.chatbot_message: Nee, u hoeft niet over te stappen. Het is een directe trein. U komt om 14:50 aan in Utrecht.

content.text: Uitstekend! You've completed all the essential Dutch lessons. You can now shop at a supermarket, order herring, visit a café, ask for directions, and navigate the train station. Goede reis!
